description: Search-visible intake queue for defense-industrial actors and organizations that are relevant enough to investigate but not yet promoted to bounded hop surfaces.

candidates.label: Silicon Valley Defense Group
candidates.why_visible: Defense innovation ecosystem convener; likely target when users search for the Silicon Valley defense layer.
candidates.next_step: Pull team/sponsor/event rows and promote only named bounded rosters, events, reports, or sponsor surfaces.

candidates.label: Anduril Industries
candidates.why_visible: Major defense-technology company repeatedly referenced in the master migration queue but not yet promoted into canonical surface ledgers.
candidates.next_step: Promote only bounded sourced surfaces such as leadership roster, Army contract/event surface, or Palantir partnership surface.

candidates.label: Palmer Luckey
candidates.why_visible: Anduril founder/CEO candidate for the defense-tech founder layer.
candidates.next_step: Promote through an Anduril leadership/founder surface or a specific sourced contract/event surface; do not infer a Clifford hop from prominence alone.

candidates.label: Trae Stephens
candidates.why_visible: Anduril co-founder/executive chairman and Founders Fund defense-tech investor candidate.
candidates.next_step: Promote through bounded Anduril leadership, Founders Fund, Defense Innovation Board, or named event surfaces with receipts.

candidates.label: Jackson Moses
candidates.why_visible: Defense-tech investor / Silent Ventures founder candidate explicitly missing from the current graph surface layer.
candidates.next_step: Promote through a Silent Ventures founder/managing-partner surface and then portfolio/fund surfaces only where sources name the relationship.

candidates.label: Silent Ventures
candidates.why_visible: Defense/deep-tech venture firm connected to Jackson Moses; relevant to the defense-capital intake layer.
candidates.next_step: Promote firm/founder and portfolio surfaces only from primary/public roster or investment pages.

candidates.label: Dr. Alex Miller
candidates.why_visible: U.S. Army CTO / Army chief-of-staff technology adviser; relevant to Right to Integrate, NGC2, and defense-industry integration surfaces.
candidates.next_step: Promote through official Army Right to Integrate / NGC2 event surfaces with named industry participants.

candidates.label: Silicon Valley defense fund / capital layer (unresolved phrase)
candidates.why_visible: User-facing search phrase that can refer to multiple entities: SVDG, Shield Capital, Silent Ventures, Founders Fund, 8VC, or other defense-focused vehicles.
candidates.next_step: Resolve the exact fund/entity before promoting any node; avoid collapsing distinct capital surfaces into one generic defense-fund node.
